VAGABOND_CRAWLER.CombatEndedResume: Combat is over. Resume crawl mode?

Settings.TimePassesHint: How many minutes advance when the Time Passes button is clicked.
Settings.EncounterRollGMOnlyHint: If enabled, encounter check results are whispered to the GM only.
Settings.HideNpcNamesHint: Remove NPC names from the top bar entirely.
Settings.AutoRemoveDefeatedHint: Defeated tokens are hidden from the strip instead of showing a skull.
Settings.EnforceCrawlMovementHint: Block tokens from moving beyond their crawl speed during the Heroes phase.
Settings.RealtimeTrackingHint: Burn light sources in real time (1 real second = 1 game second). Pauses when Foundry is paused. If disabled, light only burns when Time Passes is clicked.
